dataset_goal: Used to optimize sentiment and engagement prompts for meeting dynamics rather than generic sentiment classification.

how_to_use.prompt_optimization_target: Improve extraction of agreements, disagreements, hesitation, tension points, and evidence quotes.
how_to_use.few_shot_usage: Use one supportive case and one disagreement-heavy case as contrastive few-shot examples.

cases.title: Supportive Planning Discussion

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
transcript_segments.text: I think the rollout plan looks solid.

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
transcript_segments.text: I agree, and the timeline seems realistic.

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
transcript_segments.text: Yes, I am comfortable moving forward.

agreements: Team members explicitly supported the rollout plan.
evidence_quotes: I agree, and the timeline seems realistic.

cases.notes: Positive few-shot example for agreement-heavy meetings.

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: Let's commit to the current launch date.

transcript_segments.speaker: Engineer
transcript_segments.text: I am not convinced this will work if testing slips again.

transcript_segments.speaker: Designer
transcript_segments.text: I share that concern. The current timeline still feels risky.

agreements: Designer agrees with the engineer's concern.
disagreements: Engineer pushes back on committing to the current launch date.
hesitation_signals: The current timeline still feels risky.
tension_points: Launch timing is disputed because of testing risk.
evidence_quotes: I am not convinced this will work if testing slips again.
The current timeline still feels risky.

transcript_segments.speaker: Lead
transcript_segments.text: Any updates on the dashboard migration?

transcript_segments.speaker: Member A
transcript_segments.text: Not much this week. I am still reviewing the logs.

transcript_segments.speaker: Member B
transcript_segments.text: Same here, no major changes yet.

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: We need to keep the launch date unless there is a critical blocker.

transcript_segments.speaker: QA
transcript_segments.text: I am worried because the crash rate is still too high.

transcript_segments.speaker: Engineering Lead
transcript_segments.text: 我同意 QA 的担心，如果今天不解决这个问题，周五上线太冒险了。

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: I hear the concern, but delaying again will hurt the campaign.

agreements: Engineering Lead agrees with QA's concern.
disagreements: QA and Engineering Lead push back on keeping the current launch date.
tension_points: There is tension between launch timing and product quality risk.
evidence_quotes: I am worried because the crash rate is still too high.
如果今天不解决这个问题，周五上线太冒险了。
